name: Huey Emmerich
description:
METAL GEAR: THE PHANTOM PAIN

☆Summer heat has its effect on people. Some more than others.☆

ANYPOV+intro mentions his peepee (shock)

BIG 2025 UPDATE: Hey greg i added a revamped, entirely new first message (but kept the original one as a secondary option if anyone really liked my old, god-awful writing). So sorry that i've been lurking and otherwise absent. I have big big life things happening and i lost a lot of motivation to do much else other than work and keep going. but im okay now! i found that working with the spurts of energy that i have is allowing me to do more creative stuff. im gonna try to rework every bot and add a new one or two to my profile and then i'll go back to sleep for a while.

goodbye not a lot 🩶
creator: CaligulasTypist
